query: SELECT id, quoteId, JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.category') as category, JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.sku') as sku, JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.photoUrl') as photoUrl FROM cart_items WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.category') = 'LED BAR' LIMIT 5;
